error_signature: no output from the 'When Executed by Another Workflow' node
title: Sub-workflow not receiving data from parent workflow
symptom: The sub-workflow executes but shows no output from the 'When Executed by Another Workflow' node, despite being triggered by the parent workflow.
not_this_if: Data is visible in the sub-workflow editor
root_cause: The sub-workflow editor does not display the data passed from the parent workflow; instead, it shows null or preset values. This can lead to confusion about whether data is being passed correctly.
fix_steps: Run the parent workflow to trigger the sub-workflow.
Go to the 'Executions' section and click on 'View sub-execution' to see the data passed.
Ensure that nodes in the sub-workflow are set to use blank fields to receive data.
agent_instruction: Check the 'Executions' section to view data passed to the sub-workflow after running the parent workflow.
